global.name: Cleaning Up The Streets
description: Collect Sample Canisters from the Hyena-overrun Dark Zone. Turn them in at the Research Bench to increase Sample Size and to earn stacks of High-Quality Munitions.
High-Quality Munitions provide cumulative bonuses the larger the Sample Size gets. Reloading a weapon consumes one stack of High-Quality Munitions.

effects.effect: High-Quality Munitions also grant +35% Weapon Handling
High-Quality Munitions also grant +20% Magazine Size
High-Quality Munitions also grant +15% Damage to Armor
High-Quality Munitions also grant +15% Rate of Fire

enemy.name: Folie à Deux
description: Enemies with Folie ? Deux gain +10% damage every second after entering combat, up to a maximum of +100%.
If they are not killed within 4 seconds of first taking damage, they transfer Folie ? Deux to their closest ally on death.

In the Toxic Dark Zone, enemies with Folie ? Deux also increase your Toxicity by 100 if you are within 20 meters of them when they die. This does not occur if the enemy is killed within 4 seconds of first receiving damage.

enemy.name: Sopoforic
description: After receiving damage from enemies with Sopoforic, you become Lethargic for 20 seconds. While Lethargic, any other damage you take has a 20% chance to Disorient you for 3 seconds. Killing any enemy with Sopoforic removes Lethargic.
In the Toxic Dark Zone, any damage from enemies with Sopoforic increases your Toxicity by 20.

enemy.name: Plague Doctor
description: Enemies with Plague Doctor and their allies within 16 meters regenerate 15% Health per second.
In the Toxic Dark Zone, your Toxicity increases by 2 per second while you are in that same radius.

active.name: Vicarious
description: On activation, enemies and allies within 15 meters of you gain separate, stacking effects for the next 35 seconds:
Allies receive 20% Incoming Repairs per stack
Enemies take 20% extra damage from Skills per stack
The number of stacks is equal to the total number of allies and enemies in the radius when Vicarious is activated.
You also gain 20% Skill Efficiency for 35 seconds.
Cooldown: 120 seconds.
Vicarious automatically consumes 5 Sample Canisters on activation to improve its effects:
Skill Efficiency increases to 40% while Vicarious is active
Enemies and allies within 10 meters of your Active Skills are also affected by Vicarious, and count toward the total number of stacks
In the PvE Dark Zone, Toxicity is reduced by 50 on activation.

levels.description: The radius is increased to 25 meters around you and 15 meters around your Active Skills, if applicable.
The number of Sample Canisters needed to Surge is reduced to 4.

active.name: Pneuma
description: For 40 seconds, your Weapon Swap Speed increases by 50% and weapon kills grant one of three stacking bonuses depending on the type of weapon used.
Inhale (Marksman Rifles, Rifles and Pistols): 5% Headshot Damage and 2.5% Accuracy per stack
Hold (Assault Rifles and LMGs): 2% Crit Chance and 2.5% Stability per stack
Exhale (Shotguns and SMGs): 3% Crit Damage and 2.5% Reload Speed per stack
These bonuses are capped at 12 stacks each, and each kill increases the corresponding bonus' stack by 4.
Cooldown: 180 seconds.
Pneuma automatically consumes 5 Sample Canisters on activation to improve its effects:
The maximum stacks are increased to 20
Inhale: Headshot kills grant 3 stacks
Hold: Kills within 5 seconds of the previous kill grant 3 stacks
Exhale: Kills at a range of 7 meters or less grant 3 stacks
In the PvE Dark Zone, Toxicity is reduced by 50 on activation.

levels.description: The number of Sample Canisters needed to Surge is reduced to 4.

active.name: Invincible
description: On activation, your armor is fully repaired.
For 20 seconds, you gain 99% damage reduction against all damage sources, and gain the following bonuses while there is an enemy within 50 meters in front of you:
your movement speed increases by 20%
you gain 25% Bonus Armor on Kill until Invincible ends
you gain 10% Damage to Targets Out of Cover
When Invincible ends, you immediately take 100% of the damage you would have taken without Invincible's damage reduction.
Cooldown: 150 seconds.
Invincible automatically consumes 5 Sample Canisters on activation to improve its effects:
Bonus Armor on Kill increases to 10%, and Bonus Armor persists for 60 seconds after Invincible ends
Damage to Targets Out of Cover increases to 25%
You only take 100% damage when Invincible ends
In the PvE Dark Zone, Toxicity is reduced by 50 on activation.

levels.description: The number of Sample Canisters needed to Surge is reduced to 4.

Gadgets.name: Canister Belt
description: Your maximum capacity for High-Quality Munitions is increased by 200. When Munitions Belt is unequipped, any High-Quality Munitions beyond your regular capacity are lost.

Gadgets.name: Immune Response
description: After using an Armor Kit, you gain 20% damage reduction for 30 seconds.
In Toxic Dark Zones, you suffer no negative effects from Toxicity for the same duration. (The Toxicity meter still increases normally.)

Gadgets.name: Surge Drive
description: The cost to Surge an Active Modifier is reduced by 1 Sample Canister.
In Toxic Dark Zones, this cost is further reduced by 1.

Resistances.name: Sand And Stone
description: Increase Hazard Protection by 30%.
In Toxic Dark Zones, increase armor by 5000 for each 10% Hazard Protection.

Resistances.name: Spark And Flame
description: Increase Status Effects by 30%.
In the PvE Dark Zone, increase Weapon Damage by 2% for each 10% Status Effects.

Resistances.name: Inoculated
description: Toxicity accumulation from all sources is reduced by 50%.

Offensive.name: Viper Bite
description: After every 4 kills, all of your shots for the next 8 seconds apply Poisoned for 2 seconds.

Offensive.name: Contagion
description: You gain Infectious. When you get within 10 meters of an enemy, Contagious transfers to them. When a Contagious enemy dies, Contagious transfers to their closest ally within 15 meters. If there is no one to transfer Contagious to, it reverts to you instead.
Contagious has no effect on you, but enemies with Contagious take 40% more damage from all sources.

Offensive.name: Unfriendly Fire
description: Shooting a Hyena's shield deflects your bullets, dealing 60% of that damage to each enemy within 10 meters of the target.
